name: Muffin-Tin Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Line six muffin tin cups with turkey ham slices.
3. Break an egg into each ham slice.
4. Line six more muffin tin cups with paper liners.
5. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with muffin batter.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until eggs are cooked and muffins are golden brown.
